messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Develop a higher education orientation deck for prospective students. Save the presentation as 'University_Orientation.pptx', write everything in English, and use 16:9 Widescreen landscape slides. The design should be colorful and academic with primary colors and playful icons. Do not make any external API requests or scrape the web; hardcode all text and data values locally. You must use XL_CHART_TYPE when defining chart types. Additionally, always implement a null check for slide.shapes.title before assigning to its .text field.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = 10.0
SLIDE_HEIGHT = 7.5

PRIMARY_BLUE = "#1E3A8A"
ACCENT_GOLD = "#F59E0B"
SECONDARY_TEAL = "#0D9488"
LIGHT_BG = "#F8FAFC"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"
DARK_TEXT = "#1E293B"
MEDIUM_GRAY = "#64748B"
CARD_BG = "#FFFFFF"

FONT_PRIMARY = "Aptos"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex=LIGHT_BG):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=PRIMARY_BLUE):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.add_run()
    if title:
        run.text = title
        run.font.size = Pt(14)
        run.font.bold = True
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    if body:
        p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
        p2.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        r2 = p2.add_run()
        r2.text = "\n" + body
        r2.font.size = Pt(11)
        r2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GRAY)
        r2.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text, font_size=14, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(8), Pt(font_size))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    return txBox


def add_footer(slide, text="© 2025 University Name | www.university.edu"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.6), Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT - 0.4), Inches(8.8), Pt(12))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GRAY)
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height, label="Image"):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#E2E8F0")
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#CBD5E1")
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        tf = shape.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = label
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GRAY)
        run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY


def add_banner(slide, top=0, height=Inches(1.8), color_hex=PRIMARY_BLUE):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), top, Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH), height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    shape.line.fill.background()


def add_circle_icon(slide, left, top, size=Inches(1.2), color_hex=PRIMARY_BLUE):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left, top, size, size)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_accent_line(slide, left, top, width, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Pt(4))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    shape.line.fill.background()


def add_title_with_check(slide, text):
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        run = title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].add_run()
        run.text = text
        run.font.size = Pt(32)
        run.font.bold = True
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PRIMARY_BLUE)
        run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5), Inches(8.8), Inches(1.2), text, font_size=32, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_BLUE)


def slide_01_welcome(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PRIMARY_BLUE)

    add_banner(slide, top=Inches(0), height=Inches(2.5))

    # Decorative circles
    add_circle_icon(slide, Inches(-0.3), Inches(-0.3), size=Inches(1.8), color_hex="#3B82F6")
    add_circle_icon(slide, Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 1.5), Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT - 2.5), size=Inches(2.0), color_hex="#FBBF24")

    # University name badge
    badge = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(4.3), Inches(0.6), Inches(1.4), Inches(1.4))
    badge.fill.solid()
    badge.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
    badge.line.fill.background()
    tf = badge.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "EST.\n2025"
    run.font.size = Pt(14)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PRIMARY_BLUE)

    # Title
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(3.0), Inches(8.0), Inches(1.5), "Welcome to\nUniversity Name", font_size=42, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Subtitle
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.6), Inches(7.0), Inches(0.8), "Your Journey Starts Here — Explore Our Campus & Programs", font_size=20, color="#BFDBFE", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Decorative line
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(3.0), ACCENT_GOLD)

    # Bottom info bar
    bottom_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT - 1.2), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH), Inches(1.2))
    bottom_bar.fill.solid()
    bottom_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#1E40AF")
    bottom_bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT - 1.0), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.5), "Open House: March 15, 2025 | Admissions Open Now", font_size=14, color="#BFDBFE", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, text="© 2025 University Name | www.university.edu")


def slide_02_campus_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    add_title_with_check(slide, "Campus Overview")
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(2.0))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.5), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.6), "Discover what makes our campus a vibrant place to learn and grow.", font_size=14, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    # Stats cards row
    stats = [
        ("25,000+", "Students Enrolled"),
        ("12:1", "Faculty Ratio"),
        ("200+", "Programs Offered"),
        ("94%", "Graduation Rate")
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.0)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    total_width = 4 * card_width + 3 * gap
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - total_width) / 2
    card_top = Inches(2.5)
    card_height = Inches(1.8)

    colors = [PRIMARY_BLUE, SECONDARY_TEAL, ACCENT_GOLD, "#7C3AED"]

    for i, (stat, label) in enumerate(stats):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, card_top, card_width, card_height, stat, label, bg_color=WHITE, border_color=colors[i])
        # Circle icon above card
        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.75), card_top - Inches(1.2), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.8))
        circle.fill.solid()
        circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(colors[i])
        circle.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, text="© 2025 University Name | www.university.edu")


def slide_03_academic_programs(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    add_title_with_check(slide, "Academic Programs")
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(2.0))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.5), Inches(4.5), Inches(0.8), "Explore our diverse range of undergraduate and graduate programs designed to prepare you for a successful career.", font_size=13, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    # Pie chart
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Engineering", "Sciences", "Arts & Humanities", "Business", "Health Sciences"]
    chart_data.add_series("Programs", (30, 25, 20, 15, 10))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE,
        Inches(5.8), Inches(2.0), Inches(3.6), Inches(4.0),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    data_labels.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DARK_TEXT)

    # Program highlights on left side
    programs = [
        ("Computer Science", "AI, Data Science & Software Engineering"),
        ("Biomedical Sciences", "Research-driven health sciences program"),
        ("Business Administration", "MBA and specialized master's tracks"),
        ("Liberal Arts", "Philosophy, Literature & Social Sciences")
    ]

    for i, (prog, desc) in enumerate(programs):
        y = Inches(2.5 + i * 1.0)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), y, Inches(4.8), Inches(0.35), prog, font_size=14, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_BLUE)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.9), Inches(y.inches + 0.32), Inches(4.5), Inches(0.3), desc, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, text="© 2025 University Name | www.university.edu")


def slide_04_student_life(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    add_title_with_check(slide, "Student Life")
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(2.0))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.5), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.6), "Experience a dynamic campus community with endless opportunities.", font_size=14, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    # Left column: Extracurriculars
    left_x = Inches(0.6)
    add_card(slide, left_x, Inches(2.3), Inches(4.2), Inches(4.5), "Extracurricular Activities", "", bg_color=WHITE, border_color=SECONDARY_TEAL)

    activities = [
        ("🎭 Performing Arts", "Theater, Music & Dance Troupes"),
        ("⚽ Athletics", "Varsity Sports & Intramural Leagues"),
        ("📚 Clubs & Orgs", "150+ Student Organizations"),
        ("🌍 Study Abroad", "Programs in 40+ Countries")
    ]

    for i, (icon_title, desc) in enumerate(activities):
        y = Inches(2.6 + i * 1.0)
        add_text_box(slide, left_x + Inches(0.3), y, Inches(3.8), Inches(0.35), icon_title, font_size=14, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)
        add_text_box(slide, left_x + Inches(0.6), Inches(y.inches + 0.28), Inches(3.5), Inches(0.3), desc, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    # Right column: Campus Services
    right_x = Inches(5.2)
    add_card(slide, right_x, Inches(2.3), Inches(4.2), Inches(4.5), "Campus Services", "", bg_color=WHITE, border_color=ACCENT_GOLD)

    services = [
        ("🏠 Housing", "Modern Residences & Apartments"),
        ("🍽️ Dining", "Farm-to-Table Meal Plans"),
        ("💪 Wellness Center", "Fitness, Counseling & Health Services"),
        ("📖 Library", "24/7 Study Spaces & Digital Resources")
    ]

    for i, (icon_title, desc) in enumerate(services):
        y = Inches(2.6 + i * 1.0)
        add_text_box(slide, right_x + Inches(0.3), y, Inches(3.8), Inches(0.35), icon_title, font_size=14, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)
        add_text_box(slide, right_x + Inches(0.6), Inches(y.inches + 0.28), Inches(3.5), Inches(0.3), desc, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, text="© 2025 University Name | www.university.edu")


def slide_05_admissions(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    add_title_with_check(slide, "Admissions & Financial Aid")
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(2.0))

    # Timeline steps
    steps = [
        ("Step 1", "Apply Online", "Submit your application through our portal by the deadline."),
        ("Step 2", "Submit Documents", "Transcripts, letters of recommendation, and personal statement."),
        ("Step 3", "Get Accepted!", "Receive your decision and join our community.")
    ]

    step_width = Inches(2.8)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    total_w = 3 * step_width + 2 * gap
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - total_w) / 2

    for i, (step_num, title, desc) in enumerate(steps):
        x = start_x + i * (step_width + gap)
        y = Inches(2.0)

        # Step number circle
        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(1.0), y, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.8))
        circle.fill.solid()
        circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PRIMARY_BLUE)
        circle.line.fill.background()
        tf = circle.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = str(i + 1)
        run.font.size = Pt(24)
        run.font.bold = True
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)

        # Title and description below circle
        add_text_box(slide, x, Inches(y.inches + 0.9), step_width, Inches(0.5), title, font_size=16, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), Inches(y.inches + 1.4), step_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(1.0), desc, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Financial Aid card
    fa_card = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.2), Inches(8.8), Inches(1.3))
    fa_card.fill.solid()
    fa_card.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PRIMARY_BLUE)
    fa_card.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(5.3), Inches(4.0), Inches(0.4), "💰 Financial Aid Available", font_size=16, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(5.7), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.6), "$200M+ in scholarships awarded annually | Average aid package: $18,000 per student", font_size=13, color="#BFDBFE")

    add_footer(slide, text="© 2025 University Name | www.university.edu")


def slide_06_contact(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PRIMARY_BLUE)

    # Top decorative banner
    add_banner(slide, top=Inches(0), height=Inches(2.5))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(3.0), Inches(8.0), Inches(1.0), "Ready to Begin Your Journey?", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(4.2), Inches(3.0), ACCENT_GOLD)

    # Contact cards row
    contacts = [
        ("📧 Email", "admissions@university.edu"),
        ("📞 Phone", "(555) 123-4567"),
        ("🌐 Website", "www.university.edu")
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    gap_c = Inches(0.4)
    total_cw = 3 * card_w + 2 * gap_c
    start_cx = (SLIDE_WIDTH - total_cw) / 2

    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(contacts):
        x = start_cx + i * (card_w + gap_c)
        y = Inches(4.8)
        card = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, card_w, Inches(1.2))
        card.fill.solid()
        card.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
        card.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), Inches(y.inches + 0.15), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), label, font_size=12, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), Inches(y.inches + 0.55), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), value, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # QR placeholder
    qr_placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(4.3), Inches(5.8), Inches(1.4), Inches(1.4))
    qr_placeholder.fill.solid()
    qr_placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    qr_placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PRIMARY_BLUE)
    qr_placeholder.line.width = Pt(2)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(4.3), Inches(6.15), Inches(1.4), Inches(0.3), "Scan to Apply", font_size=10, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Social media shapes
    social_labels = ["Facebook", "Twitter", "Instagram"]
    for i, label in enumerate(social_labels):
        x = Inches(2.5 + i * 1.3)
        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x, Inches(6.0), Inches(0.4), Inches(0.4))
        circle.fill.solid()
        circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
        circle.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, text="© 2025 University Name | www.university.edu")


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH)
    prs.slide_height = Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT)

    slide_01_welcome(prs)
    slide_02_campus_overview(prs)
    slide_03_academic_programs(prs)
    slide_04_student_life(prs)
    slide_05_admissions(prs)
    slide_06_contact(prs)

    prs.save("University_Orientation.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
